text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, during training, I sense someone staring
at me. I turn to check, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An unfamiliar woman is watching our session
intently. I figure that she's just a fan or spectator
and try to shrug it off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But... she stays there standing around, even after
the training's over. Was she waiting for me?
choice_data_list: Excuse me, can I help you with something?

text_block_list.text: Oh, apologies. Did I disturb your training session?
choice_data_list: No, we were just wrapping up.

text_block_list.text:
That's a relief! I was actually hoping to borrow
you for a couple questions, if you have a minute.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: My name is Etsuko Otonashi. I'm a reporter from Twinkle Monthly.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
I was in awe watching you and your trainee
practice. I'd love to write a story about you two
and your activities to show my support. If that's
okay with you, of course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems like a polite person, and she sounds
sincere. Not to mention, a well-written article
would bring <chrname> more fans.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much. Then, let's get right to it...
What criteria do you consider when developing
your training regimen?
choice_data_list:
I put a lot of thought into what my trainee's
goals are and how I can help her reach them.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: I see. So in short, your role as a trainer is...
choice_data_list: To help my trainee achieve her dreams!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
It appears that you're ready to do anything to
help your trainee attain her dreams!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Training wherever and whenever she asks! Taking
her on hot spring tours to recover from races!
Venturing to remote mountain streams just to
fetch her a cup of water!

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text:
Ah... What devotion... I'm so moved! I promise my
article will instill a fiery passion in all who read it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And just like that, I think I got in the good books of a very inspired ally.
